title: CLIFFHANGER — Joe runs by with Eva's other shoe (Ep 4 setup)
prompt: Medium shot in @livingroom. @Eva stands on the LEFT wearing her new pink-and-white bike helmet, smiling. @Joe (small fluffy white-tan Pomeranian) trots happily across the foreground from screen-right with a single small white sneaker (a kid's shoe) clenched in his teeth. Eva (slowly realizing): "Hey… wait… JOE!" Eva (looking down at her own bare foot): "That's MY shoe!" Joe: "Yip yip!" Joe trots offscreen-left gleefully. Cliffhanger sting, warm cartoon light.
